Fields.Name: Souls
Fields.Description: The souls given upon this boss's defeat.

Fields.Name: Soul Bullet ID
Fields.Description: The bullet triggers upon this boss's defeat.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: The item lot given upon this boss's defeat.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: Multiplayer
Fields.Description: The item lot given upon this boss's defeat when in multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Defeated Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag set upon this boss's defeat every time.

Fields.Name: First Defeat Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag set upon this boss's defeat for the first time. Never unset.

Fields.Name: Bonfire Event Value ID
Fields.Description: The event value associated with the bonfire linked to this boss.

Fields.Name: Camera ID
Fields.Description: The camera parameters to use when facing this boss.

Fields.Name: Lock-On ID
Fields.Description: The lock-on parameters to use when facing this boss.

Fields.Name: HP Display Type: 1
Fields.Description: The HP display type for slot 1.

Fields.Name: HP Display Type: 2
Fields.Description: The HP display type for slot 2.

Fields.Name: HP Display Type: 3
Fields.Description: The HP display type for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Kill Effect Type
Fields.Description: The kill effect that occurs on the boss defeat.

Fields.Name: Generator Event Group ID: 1
Fields.Description: The generator event group for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Generator Event Group ID: 2
Fields.Description: The generator event group for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Generator Event Group ID: 3
Fields.Description: The generator event group for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Soul Drop Category
Fields.Description: The soul drop category for this boss.

Fields.Name: Boss Name Text: 1
Fields.Description: The boss name text for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Boss Name Text: 2
Fields.Description: The boss name text for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Boss Name Text: 3
Fields.Description: The boss name text for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Kill Effect Delay Time
Fields.Description: The duration before the kill effect occurs upon boss defeat.

Fields.Name: Bonfire ID
Fields.Description: The bonfire parameters associated with this boss.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Time Limit Reduction
Fields.Description: The amount of time limit reduction that occurs in multiplayer upon boss defeat.
